seo.title: Rotate PDF - Fix PDF page orientation online
seo.description: Rotate PDF pages in your browser to fix sideways, upside-down, or incorrectly scanned pages.

lead: Adjust PDF page orientation and export the corrected file.

strings.heroLead: Fix sideways, upside-down, or incorrectly scanned PDF pages.
strings.dropLead: Drop a PDF here, or choose a local file with the button.
